panels.description: Number of requests in RUNNING, WAITING, and SWAPPED state
panels.title: Scheduler State

panels.description: Percentage of used cache blocks by vLLM.
panels.title: Cache Utilization

panels.description: Rate of requests preempted by the scheduler (KV cache pressure or priority).
panels.title: Preemptions

panels.description: End to end request average latency.
panels.title: E2E Request Latency

panels.description: Average TTFT latency in seconds.
panels.title: Time To First Token Latency

panels.description: Mean inter token latency in seconds.
panels.title: Inter Token Latency

panels.description: P50 end to end request latency in seconds.

targets.expr:
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance", model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])))
or
(sum by(model_name) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_count{instance=~"$instance", model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) * 0)

panels.title: E2E Request Latency

panels.description: P50 TTFT latency in seconds.

or
